summary: Frontend-only UI verification of new AdsSection on Customer Home screen (Expo web preview, mobile viewport 390x844). Logged in via /auth/login (mock), landed on /(tabs)/home. All 8 requested scenarios PASSED with no code changes needed.
action_items: No fixes required. Feature matches spec exactly.
critical_code_review_comments: AdsSection.tsx is clean (~130 lines), uses useMemo for stable sort/filter, horizontal+inverted FlatList consistent with other home sections, testID pattern home-ad-<id> correctly applied.
Sort logic on isFeatured (boolean) uses if(a===b) return 0 else a.isFeatured?-1:1 — correct; featured ads rendered first in DOM order (ad-1, ad-5, ad-4, ad-6).
Component gracefully returns null when ads.length === 0 so no empty-section artifact.
home.tsx import & placement of <AdsSection/> is between the Categories row and Companies SectionHeader — exactly per spec, non-invasive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer home lives at /home (after login). Login: /auth/login with any email+password (mock RoleAuthForm). AdsSection testIDs follow pattern `home-ad-<id>` where id already contains 'ad-' prefix, so the full data-testid is `home-ad-ad-1`, `home-ad-ad-4`, `home-ad-ad-5`, `home-ad-ad-6`. RTL + inverted FlatList means data-order-first (ad-1) appears on the RIGHT visually. Only 4 active ads render; ad-2 (expired) and ad-3 (scheduled) filtered out. Workshop dashboard ads at /workshop-dashboard/ads still loads with all 6 ads and promote buttons.

verification_details.section_title_rendered: 'إعلانات ممولة' title present exactly once between Categories and Companies (الشركات)
verification_details.rightmost_visible_card: home-ad-ad-1 (featured, shows 'مميز' gold star tag) — correct for RTL+inverted

tags_present.note: 2 featured ads each show مميز tag, 4 ads each show ممول tag; extra occurrences come from surrounding mock content (workshop/company tags) and are unrelated

verification_details.other_home_sections: banner (عرض خاص), 4 categories, companies (c1-c3), workshops (w1-w4), 4 quick-services, products (p1-p4) — ALL present
verification_details.bottom_tab_bar: 5 tabs unchanged: الرئيسية, الخدمات, السلة, الإشعارات, الحساب
verification_details.workshop_dashboard_ads_regression: PASS — /workshop-dashboard/ads renders all 6 cards, filter chips, promote buttons, create button; no errors
